case_title: THEMIS DROLAPAS VS. BELLA MATROSOVA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DROLAPAS, THEMIS SERVED JUN-12-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DROLAPAS, THEMIS
